title: BUG: DID document @context uses wrong Ed25519-2020 suite URI
description: In src/did.rs line 87, the context array includes `https://w3id.org/security/suites/ed2020/v1` but the correct URI for Ed25519VerificationKey2020 is `https://w3id.org/security/suites/ed25519-2020/v1`. The current URI is a non-existent context document that will cause JSON-LD processors to fail or ignore the Ed25519 verification method type.
